title: Overview of NIELIT DLC Exams Postponement

detail.title: Overview of NIELIT DLC Exams Postponement
detail.short_info: NIELIT DLC Exams (CCC, CCCP, ECC, ACC, BCC) for January, February, and March 2026 cycles have been postponed due to administrative reasons. All exams will now be conducted in the April 2026 cycle. Revised schedule and admit cards will be released shortly on student.nielit.gov.in.

content.text: NIELIT DLC Exams Postponed for the January 2026, February 2026, and March 2026 cycles due to administrative reasons. The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) has officially announced that all Digital Literacy Course (DLC) examinations -including CCC, CCCP, ECC, ACC, and BCC -scheduled in these three cycles will now be merged and conducted together during the April 2026 exam cycle.

This consolidation aims to streamline the examination process for the large number of candidates. The revised schedule and admit cards for the April 2026 cycle will be published shortly on the official NIELIT student portal. Candidates are advised not to panic and to regularly check student.nielit.gov.in for the latest updates on the new timetable and admit cards. This article provides complete details about the postponement, affected cycles, new schedule, and what candidates should do next.

Official Update: Due to administrative reasons, the DLC (CCC/CCCP/ECC/ACC/BCC) examinations scheduled for the January 2026, February 2026 & March 2026 exam cycles have been postponed. These exams will now be conducted together during the DLC April 2026 exam cycle. The tentative exam schedule will be published shortly.

sections.heading: Overview of NIELIT DLC Exams Postponement

rows: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)
CCC, CCCP, ECC, ACC, BCC (Digital Literacy Courses - DLC)
To be released later with April 2026 cycle

sections.heading: NIELIT DLC Exams Postponed – Official Announcement

content.text: According to an official public notice issued by NIELIT, the examinations scheduled for the January, February, and March 2026 cycles have been deferred due to administrative reasons and will now be held together in April 2026.
All registered candidates for these cycles will automatically be shifted to the consolidated April 2026 exam cycle. No fresh registration is required.

The postponed examinations from January, February, and March 2026 will be conducted together during the NIELIT DLC April 2026 Exam Cycle. A tentative exam schedule will be published shortly on the official portal. The final timetable will accommodate the combined volume of candidates from all three cycles.
Direct Link to Check NIELIT DLC Exams Postponed Details: Click Here

sections.heading: Admit Cards to be Issued Later

content.text: In line with the revised schedule, the release of admit cards has also been deferred. NIELIT has clarified that hall tickets for the DLC April 2026 examination will be issued at a later stage, once the final timetable is formalized.
Candidates are advised to closely monitor official updates, as the release of hall tickets will be critical in confirming individual exam dates and centers.
